visualizations.title: Composite Number Conditions
visualizations.description: The mathematical requirements for a number to be composite.

steps.explanation: Like primes, composite numbers must be strictly greater than 1.
A composite number must have three or more distinct positive factors.

visualizations.title: Prime vs. Composite Grid Layouts
visualizations.description: Visualizing why 7 is prime (cannot form an even multi-row rectangle) and 8 is composite (forms a perfect 2 × 4 grid).
